nodes.name: Anthreptes
nodes.summary: Anthreptes（Anthreptes）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联14种鸟类，如Anchieta's sunbird、Plain sunbird、褐喉食蜜鸟等14种鸟类。

nodes.name: Little green sunbird
nodes.summary: The little green sunbird (Anthreptes seimundi), also called Seimund's sunbird, is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is sometimes placed in the genus Nectarinia. It is widespread throughout the African tropical rainforest. Description The little green sunbird is small, light yellow, and warbler-like; overall similar to the Bates's sunbird. It is 9 cm (about 3.5 inches) long. The beak is slightly curved and has a small amount of pink. Around the eye is a pale ring. Its cry is high pitched. Name The little green sunbird's binomial classification Anthreptes seimundi comes from its genus and Eibert Carl Henry Seimund, a British Taxidermist. Subspecies A. s. seimundi: Bioko (Gulf of Guinea) A. s. kruensis: Guinea and Sierra Leone to Ghana and Togo. A. s. minor: southern Nigeria and southern Cameroon east to Central African Republic, southern South Sudan, Uganda, and Rwanda, south to northern Angola and central Democratic Republic of the Congo. Gallery References
